channel.title: Shahab Abbasi – SEO Expert
channel.description: Expert SEO services, tools, guides, and strategies by Shahab Abbasi.

item.title: The Ultimate SEO Strategy Guide for 2026: Rank #1 on Google
item.description: Discover the proven SEO strategies that will help your website dominate Google search results in 2026 and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Complete Technical SEO Audit Checklist: 50+ Points to Check
item.description: A step-by-step technical SEO audit checklist covering crawlability, indexing, site speed, mobile optimization, and structured data.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Local SEO Guide: How to Dominate Google Maps & Local Pack
item.description: Master local SEO to drive foot traffic and local leads. From Google Business Profile to local citations, this guide covers it all.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: E-commerce SEO: The Complete Guide to Ranking Product Pages
item.description: Learn how to optimize your online store for search engines and drive organic sales with proven e-commerce SEO strategies.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: 10 Link Building Strategies That Drive Real Results in 2026
item.description: Build a powerful backlink profile with these 10 proven link building strategies. From guest posting to digital PR, learn what actually works.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Content Marketing & SEO: How to Create Content That Ranks
item.description: Combine content marketing with SEO to create articles, guides, and resources that rank on Google and drive consistent organic traffic.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Google Algorithm Updates 2026: What Changed and How to Adapt
item.description: Stay informed about the latest Google algorithm updates and learn how to adapt your SEO strategy to maintain and improve your rankings.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Keyword Research Guide: Find High-Value Keywords That Convert
item.description: Learn how to find the perfect keywords for your SEO strategy. From seed keywords to long-tail opportunities, this guide covers every technique.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: On-Page SEO Optimization: The Complete Checklist for 2026
item.description: Optimize every element on your web pages for maximum search visibility. This on-page SEO checklist covers everything from title tags to internal linking.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: AI SEO & GEO: How to Optimize for AI Search Engines in 2026
item.description: Discover how to optimize your content for AI-powered search engines with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). The future of search is here.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Scandinavian SEO: The Complete Guide to Ranking in Nordic Markets
item.description: A comprehensive guide to SEO in Scandinavian markets covering Danish, Swedish, Norwegian, and Finnish search optimization strategies.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Technical SEO
item.description: Professional Technical SEO services by Shahab Abbasi.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: SEO Training & Workshops
item.description: Professional SEO Training & Workshops services by Shahab Abbasi.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Word Counter
item.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time instantly.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Character Counter
item.description: Count characters with/without spaces. Perfect for Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn limits.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Keyword Density Checker
item.description: Analyze keyword frequency, density percentage, and top keywords in your content.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Readability Score Checker
item.description: Check Flesch-Kincaid score, grade level, and sentence complexity of your content.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Duplicate Sentence Finder
item.description: Find repeated sentences and phrases in your content for originality.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
item.description: Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences, or words for your designs.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Text Case Converter
item.description: Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, and more.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Article Rewriting Helper
item.description: Highlights overused words, shows word frequency, and suggests improvements.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Headline Analyzer
item.description: Score headlines for emotional impact, power words, length, and readability.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Basic Grammar Checker
item.description: Check for common grammar errors, passive voice, wordiness, and more.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Meta Tag Generator
item.description: Generate HTML meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Twitter cards with live preview.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Google SERP Preview
item.description: Preview how your page will appear in Google search results on desktop and mobile.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Bulk Title Tag Checker
item.description: Check multiple title tags at once for character count, pixel width, and SEO compliance.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Meta Description Checker
item.description: Check meta description length, keyword presence, CTA, and truncation preview.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Heading Structure Analyzer
item.description: Visualize your H1-H6 heading hierarchy and find structural issues.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Image Alt Text Suggestion
item.description: Generate SEO-friendly alt text suggestions from image context descriptions.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Canonical Tag Generator
item.description: Generate canonical link tags to manage duplicate content across your site.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Open Graph Preview
item.description: Preview how your link appears when shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Google Index Status Info
item.description: Learn how to check if your pages are indexed by Google using the site: operator.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Bulk Index Checker
item.description: Check if multiple URLs are indexed by Google in bulk using the site: operator with staggered tab opening.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: SERP Checker
item.description: Check your website's position in search engine results for target keywords.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Robots.txt Generator
item.description: Build a robots.txt file with allow/disallow rules, sitemaps, and user agents.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: XML Sitemap Generator
item.description: Generate XML sitemaps with URLs, priority, change frequency, and last modified dates.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: .htaccess Redirect Generator
item.description: Generate 301 and 302 redirect rules for your .htaccess file.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Schema Markup Generator
item.description: Generate JSON-LD schema for LocalBusiness, Article, Product, FAQ, and more.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: JSON-LD Validator
item.description: Validate JSON-LD syntax, check for errors, and preview parsed output.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Hreflang Tag Generator
item.description: Generate hreflang link tags for multi-language and multi-region pages.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: URL Slug Generator
item.description: Convert any text to clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs instantly.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: URL Encoder/Decoder
item.description: Encode or decode URLs for proper formatting and safe transmission.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: HTTP Status Code Reference
item.description: Look up any HTTP status code and understand its meaning and SEO implications.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Page Size Calculator
item.description: Estimate page size from HTML, CSS, and JS inputs for speed optimization.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Core Web Vitals Guide Tool
item.description: Interactive guide to understanding and improving Core Web Vitals metrics.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Page Speed Checker
item.description: Analyze page load speed and get recommendations for improvement.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: XML to URL Converter
item.description: Extract and convert URLs from XML sitemaps for analysis and auditing.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Keyword Suggestion Tool
item.description: Generate long-tail keyword variations from a seed keyword using proven patterns.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: LSI Keyword Generator
item.description: Generate related semantic keywords and phrases for better content relevance.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: People Also Ask Generator
item.description: Generate question-based keywords: who, what, when, where, why, how, and more.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Keyword Gap Planner
item.description: Plan keyword targeting strategy by identifying gaps vs competitors.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Search Intent Classifier
item.description: Classify keywords by search intent: Informational, Navigational, Commercial, Transactional.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Keyword Grouper
item.description: Group keywords by common themes and words for organized content planning.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Bulk Keyword Checker
item.description: Check rankings for multiple keywords across Google Search at once.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: LinkedIn Post Formatter
item.description: Format LinkedIn posts with bold/italic Unicode text, emojis, and hashtags.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: LinkedIn Headline Generator
item.description: Generate compelling LinkedIn headline options optimized for visibility.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: LinkedIn Summary Generator
item.description: Generate a professional LinkedIn About section from your career details.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: X/Twitter Thread Formatter
item.description: Split long text into tweet-sized chunks with thread numbering.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Social Media Image Size Guide
item.description: Interactive reference for correct image sizes across all social platforms.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Hashtag Generator
item.description: Generate relevant hashtags for your posts across all social platforms.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Instagram Bio Generator
item.description: Generate engaging Instagram bios with emojis and call-to-action.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Social Post Calendar Template
item.description: Weekly and monthly social media content calendar template.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: GMB Audit Checklist Tool
item.description: Interactive checklist to optimize your Google Business Profile listing.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Citation Source Finder
item.description: Find top citation directories to list your business by country and city.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: NAP Consistency Checker
item.description: Check business name, address, and phone variations for consistency.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Review Response Generator
item.description: Generate professional responses to positive and negative customer reviews.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Local Keyword Generator
item.description: Generate local keyword combinations from service and city inputs.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: GBP Keyword Checker
item.description: Bulk keyword checker for Google Business Profile local rankings.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: AI Search Prompt Generator
item.description: Generate prompts to test your brand visibility in AI search engines.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: AI Content Structure Optimizer
item.description: Analyze content structure against AI search best practices.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Brand Mention Tracking Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to track if AI search engines mention your brand.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Anchor Text Analyzer
item.description: Categorize and analyze anchor text distribution for healthy link profiles.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Guest Post Pitch Generator
item.description: Generate customized guest post outreach email templates.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Broken Link Email Generator
item.description: Generate outreach emails for broken link building campaigns.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Backlink Quality Checklist
item.description: Interactive checklist to evaluate backlink quality and worth.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Disavow File Generator
item.description: Generate properly formatted disavow.txt files for Google Search Console.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Product Description Optimizer
item.description: Check product descriptions for keyword presence, length, and SEO quality.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Ecommerce Schema Generator
item.description: Generate Product, Offer, and AggregateRating schema for product pages.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Category Page SEO Checklist
item.description: Interactive checklist for optimizing ecommerce category pages.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: SEO ROI Calculator
item.description: Calculate estimated SEO revenue, ROI percentage, and break-even point.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: SEO vs PPC Savings Calculator
item.description: Calculate how much you save with SEO vs paying for Google Ads clicks.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Domain Age Lookup
item.description: Check domain registration date and estimated age for SEO insights.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Website Cost Estimator
item.description: Estimate website development costs based on features and complexity.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: CTA Button Text Generator
item.description: Generate compelling call-to-action text options for any page or goal.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: A/B Test Duration Calculator
item.description: Calculate required test duration based on traffic and conversion goals.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Color Contrast Checker
item.description: Check color combinations for WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Page Speed Optimization Checklist
item.description: Interactive 25-point checklist for optimizing page loading speed.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Email Subject Line Tester
item.description: Score email subject lines for length, power words, and spam triggers.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Cold Outreach Email Generator
item.description: Generate customized cold outreach email templates for link building and partnerships.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Google Ads Budget Calculator
item.description: Plan your Google Ads budget by estimating clicks, conversions, revenue, and ROAS from your campaign metrics.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: ROAS Calculator
item.description: Calculate Return on Ad Spend, ACoS, net profit, and break-even ROAS for your paid advertising campaigns.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Ad Copy Generator
item.description: Generate Google Ads responsive search ad headlines (30 chars) and descriptions (90 chars) for your campaigns.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Quality Score Estimator
item.description: Estimate your Google Ads Quality Score with a 12-factor checklist covering ad relevance, CTR, and landing pages.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: PPC Campaign Audit Checklist
item.description: 20-point PPC campaign audit covering structure, keywords, ad copy, bidding, and conversion tracking.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Bulk Expired Domain Checker
item.description: Check multiple domains in bulk for expiration status. Identify potentially expired or available domains for acquisition.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Domain Authority Checker
item.description: Estimate domain authority score based on TLD quality, domain length, brandability, and HTTPS status.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Redirect Chain Checker
item.description: Trace redirect chains for URLs including HTTP→HTTPS, www redirects, and trailing slash redirects.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Broken Link Checker
item.description: Scan any webpage to find broken outbound links. Identify dead links hurting your SEO and user experience.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Bulk URL Issue Checker
item.description: Check multiple URLs in bulk for 404 errors, dead links, timeouts, and other HTTP issues. Export results as CSV.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi

item.title: Force Google Indexing
item.description: Ping Google & Bing to request fast indexing of your URLs. Bulk submit up to 100 URLs with IndexNow support.
item.dc:creator: Shahab Abbasi
